channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Plex se transforme en réseau social pour le streaming, voici les nouveautés
item.description: Plex veut faire ce que Netflix et Amazon n'ont jamais réussi : créer une vraie communauté autour du streaming. Lists, Discussions, Match Score... L'annonce est ambitieuse.

item.title: Ce vidéoprojecteur Ultra HD à courte focale s’offre une belle promotion de 500 euros
item.description: Le Hisense PX3-Pro est facile à installer et rend une belle copie sur la partie audio et vidéo. Si son prix original de 2 499 euros pouvait en rebuter certains, il est actuellement disponible à 1 999 euros.

item.title: How to watch FIFA World Cup 2026 in Canada
item.description: How to watch World Cup 2026 in Canada. Led by Jesse Marsch and Alphonso Davies, the Canucks have a golden opportunity to make their mark in Group B.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for June 8, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for June 8, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: Beyond the prompt: 5 ways to use AI after you’ve mastered the basics
item.description: Stop treating AI like a search engine and starting treating it like an analytical partner. When it comes to generative AI, mastering the art of crafting a basic prompt that will return a solid response is a great first step. But it’s a bit like buying a sports car just to drive it to the grocery store. It may get the job done, but there’s so much more it can do....

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for June 8, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.
